articles.author: Ben Kamisar, Jane C. Timm, Bridget Bowman
articles.title: What to watch in Tuesday's elections: Trump seeks payback against Republicans who opposed him - NBC News
articles.description: President Donald Trump's revenge tour against dissident Republicans hits Indiana's primaries on Tuesday, as he and allies try to unseat seven Republican state senators who voted last year against a Trump-backed congressional map
